name: @forgeax/hello-multi-material
description: Multi-prim + mixed-topology demo (feat-20260608-mesh-multi-section-primitive-multi-material-slot): a single MeshAsset carries two submeshes (triangle-list quad + line-list wireframe box) bound to two distinct MaterialAssets through MeshRenderer.materials[]. End-to-end proof of submeshes[i] <-> materials[i] index alignment + per-submesh PSO selection.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle shape downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: multi-material correctness exemplar; fps anchored by hello-triangle / hello-cube

bench.reason: correctness exemplar; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the M5 hello-multi-material multi-prim + mixed-topology exemplar
